products.title: Vertical Gola Profile
features: Ideal for handle-less furniture especially vertical, tall units like larder pull-out in kitchen, wardrobe shutters, etc.
Available in L and C models for single or double door application.
Length: 3 mtr.

products.title: 125° Hinge-Overlay (Soft Close)
features: Ideal for openable wardrobes
Unique buit in damping system allows the shutter to close in slow motion without banging
Available in full overlay
Max opening 125°
Max shutter size: 34 inch x 22 inch (850mm x 550 mm) for 2 hinges
Shutter cavity: ⌀ mm, 13mm deep, cavity 4mm from edge
Finish: Nickel Plated.
